purpose: Executable Track B manifest. Only supported downloader fields appear inside sources; audit metadata lives at the top level.

default_policy.enabled_scope: Only small metadata/API probes and bounded public HTML pages are enabled.
default_policy.large_downloads: All corpora, article dumps, WARC payloads and torrent descriptors remain disabled until explicitly selected.
default_policy.raw_content: Keep raw downloads in the ignored cache; commit only short, attributed, rewritten mechanism facts.
default_policy.rights: Publicly reachable does not mean openly licensed. Obey source terms, attribution, privacy, deletion and removal requirements.

volume_by_id.hf_namuwiki_full_parquet: 2,357,235,583 B compressed; about 9,701,946,000 B decoded memory
volume_by_id.academic_torrents_2026_06_details_probe: single HTML details page; referenced payload 70.38 GiB
volume_by_id.academic_torrents_reddit_month_2026_06: small descriptor; opening it can fetch 70.38 GiB

risk_by_family.huggingface: CC BY-NC-SA: noncommercial, attribution and share-alike; historical raw text includes contributor identifiers.
risk_by_family.wikimedia: Latest aliases are mutable; pin dated dumps and hashes. Page-specific imports/exceptions and attribution still apply.
risk_by_family.common_crawl: The archive is not a blanket content license. Query CDX first and fetch only the exact WARC byte range.
risk_by_family.arctic_shift: Unofficial rate-limited archive with no uptime guarantee or blanket dataset license; honor privacy and removals.
risk_by_family.academic_torrents: Reddit dataset license fields are blank. Torrent descriptors can trigger 70 GiB to multi-TiB transfers.
risk_by_family.url_list: Public HTML is copyrighted editorial material. Cache privately; retain only URLs and short rewritten facts.
